meta.northy_message: Sunday. Zero Steve activity. Counters incremented. Extract-atoms surfaced DataArt nearshore pivot + Raju on AI killing async handoffs. Monday: DAY 15 of systems-mode. Three revenue actions before anything else.

act_now.title: Systems-Mode Trap: DAY 15 — zero revenue activity, 41 days to Sept 1
act_now.detail: Day 15 since last revenue conversation. Two full weeks. Cash $97.7K. 41 days to Sept 1. This is the ULP pattern — building feels like progress, but it doesn't close Garland.
act_now.action: Monday morning: three revenue actions before anything else. Text Jodi. Call one superintendent.

act_now.title: Zig is flying blind — HubSpot pipeline data stale since July 6 (15 days)
act_now.detail: Zig's hubspot skill missing from runtime. Last live pull July 6. 51 of 68 renewal districts (72%) still in 'To Be Renewed.' 41 days to Sept 1.
act_now.action: Direct Raju/Woz: restore Zig's HubSpot MCP access Monday. Live pipeline data before any other fleet work.

act_now.title: Patrick equity cliff OVERDUE +5 — 30 days of lag
act_now.detail: July 15 passed. Now July 20. Five days overdue. No equity conversation. 30 days total lag time. This gets harder every day.
act_now.action: Call him Monday. Use STATE. 100% honest AND 100% respectful. The avoidance compounds.

act_now.title: Revenue target contradiction: Zig at $1.5M vs Steve at $1M — 24 days
act_now.detail: Zig's target: $1.5M by Aug 1. Real target: $1M by Sept 1. 24 days uncorrected. Every day this goes uncorrected, Zig optimizes for the wrong number.
act_now.action: Tell Zig: 'Target is $1M by Sept 1. Recompute.' Ten seconds.

act_now.title: Both revenue Slack channels archived — no revenue coordination surface
act_now.detail: #sales_revenue-ninjas and #renewal-gtm-alignment both archived June 29. Revenue coordination has no Slack home. Archived channels = archived priorities.
act_now.action: Reactivate one revenue channel or state in #ai-ceo-team that revenue coordination lives there.

act_now.title: Natasha renewals unassigned — 66 days, ~$42K ILTexas + 5 others
act_now.detail: ILTexas $42K + 5 other renewals. Over two months unassigned. Revenue sitting on a shelf.
act_now.action: Assign to Teela or Jan Monday. This doesn't need a meeting — it needs an owner.

act_now.title: Cockpit uses three retired colors — #12A38C, #107569, #101828
act_now.detail: Design v4.0.0 retired #12A38C, #107569, #0D5A52. Cockpit still uses them. Brand canon: #15B79E / #0E766A / #111928. System font stack.
act_now.action: Decide: (a) align cockpit to brand canon v4.0.0, or (b) declare cockpit intentionally distinct.

quick_access.label: Design Hub — How Bookmarked Does Design

intel.title: Senses & Reflexes architecture: recipe format with dependency graphs, integration marketplace
intel.pattern: Each agent skill defined as a recipe with explicit dependency graphs. YC Startup School: 6K founders, 12%→4% OK ratings via skill-based matching + /improve loop. The fleet's next evolution is declarative composition.
intel.applies_to: Existing agent fleet (Nero/Northy/Forge) can be defined as declarative recipes. Forge evaluate: recipe format for agent composition + dependency graphs.

intel.title: Neuroscience-inspired agent architecture: hippocampus (memory), basal ganglia (action), thalamus (conflict resolution)
intel.pattern: 'Agents aren't the product — foundational capabilities are.' Three brain regions map to G-Brain (memory), Northy (action selection), Forge (execution gating). External validation of the founding trio architecture.
intel.applies_to: The founding trio maps cleanly to Karpathy's neuroscience framework. File as architectural validation — the world is converging on what Steve built 6 weeks ago.

intel.title: Slack Coach pattern: agent flags hedging, unclear asks, buried points in exec channels
intel.pattern: Agent sits in exec Slack channels, flags communication anti-patterns. Lightweight, proven at Zapier scale. Implementable as a single Hermes skill reading Slack MCP.
intel.applies_to: Could run as a lightweight skill in #ai-ceo-team or #ceo channel. Surfaces communication drift early.

intel.title: Company-as-context-layer: 'The moat is how legible your company is'
intel.pattern: AI-era moat isn't model access — it's institutional legibility. The more structured your company's knowledge, the more leverage AI gives you. Direct validation of G-Brain + agent fleet.
intel.applies_to: Strategic validation, not technical upgrade. G-Brain being populated with every decision, conversation, and pattern IS the moat.

intel.title: AI factories with no money or traffic — distribution warning
intel.pattern: Builders spending months on agent architecture without shipping revenue. External echo of N-084 systems-mode trap. Revenue comes from selling, not architecting.
intel.applies_to: Direct echo of N-084. Not new insight — confirmation. Monday: revenue first.

intel.title: GBrain at 26K stars, company-brain mode documented — multi-user, OAuth-scoped institutional memory
intel.pattern: Company brain mode now documented. 90-min tutorial. YC RFS for company-brain builders. Production-grade shared institutional memory.
intel.applies_to: If Bookmarked ever needs shared institutional memory: the path is paved.

intel.title: Multi-agent orchestrator-worker: 90% improvement over single-agent, parallel subagents, production patterns
intel.pattern: Lead agent decomposes queries, spawns parallel subagents. Prompt principles: teach delegation, scale effort to complexity. Fable 5 + Sonnet 5: 92% at 63% price.
intel.applies_to: Direct validation of agent fleet. Prompt engineering principles are transferable to Forge's orchestration.

intel.title: Institutional Memory, Not Model Access, Is the AI-Native Moat
intel.pattern: Durable asset isn't model access. It's accumulated skills, memory, processes. 'Skill file = employee. Resolver table = org chart.' Never one-off work — skillify it.
intel.applies_to: Direct validation of agent fleet approach. Every Bookmarked agent skill is a moat-building asset.
